mapper.select:
SELECT DATE_FORMAT(CONVERT_TZ(FROM_UNIXTIME(date/1000), @@session.time_zone,#{vo.timeZoneDb}),'%Y-%m-%d') as staticDate, site_code, currency as currencyCode,
IFNULL(SUM(member_registration_count), 0) AS registerTotal, IFNULL(SUM(member_registration_count_backed), 0) AS registerBacked, IFNULL(SUM(member_registration_count_pc), 0) AS registerPc, IFNULL(SUM(member_registration_count_android_app), 0) AS registerAndroidAPP, IFNULL(SUM(member_registration_count_android_h5), 0) AS registerAndroidH5, IFNULL(SUM(member_registration_count_ios_app), 0) AS registerIosAPP, IFNULL(SUM(member_registration_count_ios_h5), 0) AS registerIosH5,
IFNULL(SUM(member_login_count), 0) AS loginTotal, IFNULL(SUM(member_login_count_backed), 0) AS loginBacked, IFNULL(SUM(member_login_count_pc), 0) AS loginPc, IFNULL(SUM(member_login_count_android_app), 0) AS loginAndroidAPP, IFNULL(SUM(member_login_count_android_h5), 0) AS loginAndroidH5, IFNULL(SUM(member_login_count_ios_app), 0) AS loginIosAPP, IFNULL(SUM(member_login_count_ios_h5), 0) AS loginIosH5,
IFNULL(SUM(total_member_deposit), 0) AS totalDeposit, IFNULL(SUM(total_member_deposit_people_number), 0) AS depositPeopleNums, IFNULL(SUM(total_member_deposit_times), 0) AS depositNums,
IFNULL(SUM(total_member_withdrawal), 0) AS totalWithdraw, IFNULL(SUM(total_member_withdrawal_people_number), 0) AS withdrawPeopleNums, IFNULL(SUM(total_member_withdrawal_times), 0) AS withdrawNums, IFNULL(SUM(total_member_withdrawal_big_people_number), 0) AS largeWithdrawPeopleNums, IFNULL(SUM(total_member_withdrawal_big_times), 0) AS largeWithdrawNums, IFNULL(SUM(member_deposit_withdrawal_difference), 0) AS memberAccessDifference,
IFNULL(SUM(first_member_deposit_amount), 0) AS firstDepositAmount, IFNULL(SUM(first_member_deposit_people_number), 0) AS firstDepositPeopleNums,
IFNULL(SUM(member_betting_amount), 0) AS betAmount, IFNULL(SUM(member_betting_valid_amount), 0) AS effectiveBetAmount, IFNULL(SUM(member_betting_people_number), 0) AS bettorNums, IFNULL(SUM(member_betting_number), 0) AS bettingOrderAmount, IFNULL(SUM(member_profit_loss), 0) AS memberWinOrLose,
IFNULL(SUM(member_vip_benefits_amount), 0) AS vipWelfareAmount, IFNULL(SUM(member_vip_benefits_people_number), 0) AS vipWelfarePeopleNums,
IFNULL(SUM(member_activity_discounts_amount), 0) AS promotionAmount, IFNULL(SUM(member_activity_discounts_people_number), 0) AS promotionPeopleNums,
IFNULL(SUM(used_discounts), 0) AS usedPromotion,
IFNULL(SUM(member_adjustments_amount), 0) AS totalAdjust, IFNULL(SUM(member_adjustments_add_amount), 0) AS addAmount, IFNULL(SUM(member_adjustments_add_people_number), 0) AS addAmountPeopleNum, IFNULL(SUM(member_adjustments_reduce_amount), 0) AS reduceAmount, IFNULL(SUM(member_adjustments_reduce_people_number), 0) AS reduceAmountPeopleNums,
IFNULL(SUM(platform_total_adjust), 0) AS platformTotalAdjust, IFNULL(SUM(platform_add_amount), 0) AS platformAddAmount, IFNULL(SUM(platform_add_people_num), 0) AS platformAddPeopleNum, IFNULL(SUM(platform_reduce_amount), 0) AS platformReduceAmount, IFNULL(SUM(platform_reduce_people_nums), 0) AS platformReducePeopleNums,
IFNULL(SUM(tips_amount), 0) AS tipsAmount,
IFNULL(SUM(risk_amount), 0) AS riskAmount, IFNULL(SUM(risk_add_amount), 0) AS riskAddAmount, IFNULL(SUM(risk_add_people_num), 0) AS riskAddPeopleNum, IFNULL(SUM(risk_reduce_amount), 0) AS riskReduceAmount, IFNULL(SUM(risk_reduce_people_num), 0) AS riskReducePeopleNum,
IFNULL(SUM(agent_registration_count), 0) AS agentRegisterTotal, IFNULL(SUM(agent_registration_count_backed), 0) AS agentRegisterBacked, IFNULL(SUM(agent_registration_count_pc), 0) AS agentRegisterPc, IFNULL(SUM(agent_registration_count_android_app), 0) AS agentRegisterAndroidAPP, IFNULL(SUM(agent_registration_count_android_h5), 0) AS agentRegisterAndroidH5, IFNULL(SUM(agent_registration_count_ios_app), 0) AS agentRegisterIosAPP, IFNULL(SUM(agent_registration_count_ios_h5), 0) AS agentRegisterIosH5,
IFNULL(SUM(stored_members_limit), 0) AS agentCredit, IFNULL(SUM(stored_members_limit_people_number), 0) AS agentCreditPeopleNums, IFNULL(SUM(stored_members_limit_times), 0) AS agentCreditTimes
FROM report_membership_stats WHERE 1=1
AND DATE(FROM_UNIXTIME(date / 1000)) >= CURDATE() - INTERVAL 7 DAY
AND site_code = #{vo.siteCode}
AND currency = #{vo.currencyCode}
AND date >= #{vo.beginTime}
AND date <= #{vo.endTime}
GROUP BY staticDate, currency
ORDER BY staticDate desc,currency asc

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(CONVERT_TZ(FROM_UNIXTIME(date / 1000), @@session.time_zone,#{vo.timeZoneDb}), '%Y-%m-%d') as staticDate, site_code, currency as currencyCode,
IFNULL(SUM(member_registration_count), 0) AS registerTotal, IFNULL(SUM(member_registration_count_backed), 0) AS registerBacked, IFNULL(SUM(member_registration_count_pc), 0) AS registerPc, IFNULL(SUM(member_registration_count_android_app), 0) AS registerAndroidAPP, IFNULL(SUM(member_registration_count_android_h5), 0) AS registerAndroidH5, IFNULL(SUM(member_registration_count_ios_app), 0) AS registerIosAPP, IFNULL(SUM(member_registration_count_ios_h5), 0) AS registerIosH5,
IFNULL(SUM(member_login_count), 0) AS loginTotal, IFNULL(SUM(member_login_count_backed), 0) AS loginBacked, IFNULL(SUM(member_login_count_pc), 0) AS loginPc, IFNULL(SUM(member_login_count_android_app), 0) AS loginAndroidAPP, IFNULL(SUM(member_login_count_android_h5), 0) AS loginAndroidH5, IFNULL(SUM(member_login_count_ios_app), 0) AS loginIosAPP, IFNULL(SUM(member_login_count_ios_h5), 0) AS loginIosH5,
IFNULL(SUM(total_member_deposit), 0) AS totalDeposit, IFNULL(SUM(total_member_deposit_people_number), 0) AS depositPeopleNums, IFNULL(SUM(total_member_deposit_times), 0) AS depositNums,
IFNULL(SUM(total_member_withdrawal), 0) AS totalWithdraw, IFNULL(SUM(total_member_withdrawal_people_number), 0) AS withdrawPeopleNums, IFNULL(SUM(total_member_withdrawal_times), 0) AS withdrawNums, IFNULL(SUM(total_member_withdrawal_big_people_number), 0) AS largeWithdrawPeopleNums, IFNULL(SUM(total_member_withdrawal_big_times), 0) AS largeWithdrawNums, IFNULL(SUM(member_deposit_withdrawal_difference), 0) AS memberAccessDifference,
IFNULL(SUM(first_member_deposit_amount), 0) AS firstDepositAmount, IFNULL(SUM(first_member_deposit_people_number), 0) AS firstDepositPeopleNums,
IFNULL(SUM(member_betting_amount), 0) AS betAmount, IFNULL(SUM(member_betting_valid_amount), 0) AS effectiveBetAmount,
IFNULL(SUM(member_betting_number), 0) AS bettingOrderAmount, IFNULL(SUM(member_profit_loss), 0) AS memberWinOrLose,
IFNULL(SUM(member_vip_benefits_amount), 0) AS vipWelfareAmount, IFNULL(SUM(member_vip_benefits_people_number), 0) AS vipWelfarePeopleNums,
IFNULL(SUM(member_activity_discounts_amount), 0) AS promotionAmount, IFNULL(SUM(member_activity_discounts_people_number), 0) AS promotionPeopleNums,
IFNULL(SUM(used_discounts), 0) AS usedPromotion,
IFNULL(SUM(member_adjustments_amount), 0) AS totalAdjust, IFNULL(SUM(member_adjustments_add_amount), 0) AS addAmount, IFNULL(SUM(member_adjustments_add_people_number), 0) AS addAmountPeopleNum, IFNULL(SUM(member_adjustments_reduce_amount), 0) AS reduceAmount, IFNULL(SUM(member_adjustments_reduce_people_number), 0) AS reduceAmountPeopleNums,
IFNULL(SUM(platform_total_adjust), 0) AS platformTotalAdjust, IFNULL(SUM(platform_add_amount), 0) AS platformAddAmount, IFNULL(SUM(platform_add_people_num), 0) AS platformAddPeopleNum, IFNULL(SUM(platform_reduce_amount), 0) AS platformReduceAmount, IFNULL(SUM(platform_reduce_people_nums), 0) AS platformReducePeopleNums,
IFNULL(SUM(tips_amount), 0) AS tipsAmount,
IFNULL(SUM(risk_amount), 0) AS riskAmount, IFNULL(SUM(risk_add_amount), 0) AS riskAddAmount, IFNULL(SUM(risk_add_people_num), 0) AS riskAddPeopleNum, IFNULL(SUM(risk_reduce_amount), 0) AS riskReduceAmount, IFNULL(SUM(risk_reduce_people_num), 0) AS riskReducePeopleNum,
IFNULL(SUM(agent_registration_count), 0) AS agentRegisterTotal, IFNULL(SUM(agent_registration_count_backed), 0) AS agentRegisterBacked, IFNULL(SUM(agent_registration_count_pc), 0) AS agentRegisterPc, IFNULL(SUM(agent_registration_count_android_app), 0) AS agentRegisterAndroidAPP, IFNULL(SUM(agent_registration_count_android_h5), 0) AS agentRegisterAndroidH5, IFNULL(SUM(agent_registration_count_ios_app), 0) AS agentRegisterIosAPP, IFNULL(SUM(agent_registration_count_ios_h5), 0) AS agentRegisterIosH5,
IFNULL(SUM(stored_members_limit), 0) AS agentCredit, IFNULL(SUM(stored_members_limit_people_number), 0) AS agentCreditPeopleNums, IFNULL(SUM(stored_members_limit_times), 0) AS agentCreditTimes
FROM report_membership_stats WHERE 1=1
AND DATE(FROM_UNIXTIME(date / 1000)) >= CURDATE() - INTERVAL 7 DAY
AND site_code = #{vo.siteCode}
AND currency = #{vo.currencyCode}
AND date >= #{vo.beginTime}
AND date <= #{vo.endTime}
GROUP BY staticDate, site_code, currency
GROUP BY staticDate, currency
ORDER BY staticDate DESC, site_code ASC, currency ASC

SELECT site_code, currency as currencyCode,
IFNULL(SUM(member_registration_count), 0) AS registerTotal, IFNULL(SUM(member_registration_count_backed), 0) AS registerBacked, IFNULL(SUM(member_registration_count_pc), 0) AS registerPc, IFNULL(SUM(member_registration_count_android_app), 0) AS registerAndroidAPP, IFNULL(SUM(member_registration_count_android_h5), 0) AS registerAndroidH5, IFNULL(SUM(member_registration_count_ios_app), 0) AS registerIosAPP, IFNULL(SUM(member_registration_count_ios_h5), 0) AS registerIosH5,
IFNULL(SUM(member_login_count), 0) AS loginTotal, IFNULL(SUM(member_login_count_backed), 0) AS loginBacked, IFNULL(SUM(member_login_count_pc), 0) AS loginPc, IFNULL(SUM(member_login_count_android_app), 0) AS loginAndroidAPP, IFNULL(SUM(member_login_count_android_h5), 0) AS loginAndroidH5, IFNULL(SUM(member_login_count_ios_app), 0) AS loginIosAPP, IFNULL(SUM(member_login_count_ios_h5), 0) AS loginIosH5,
IFNULL(SUM(total_member_deposit), 0) AS totalDeposit, IFNULL(SUM(total_member_deposit_people_number), 0) AS depositPeopleNums, IFNULL(SUM(total_member_deposit_times), 0) AS depositNums,
IFNULL(SUM(total_member_withdrawal), 0) AS totalWithdraw, IFNULL(SUM(total_member_withdrawal_people_number), 0) AS withdrawPeopleNums, IFNULL(SUM(total_member_withdrawal_times), 0) AS withdrawNums, IFNULL(SUM(total_member_withdrawal_big_people_number), 0) AS largeWithdrawPeopleNums, IFNULL(SUM(total_member_withdrawal_big_times), 0) AS largeWithdrawNums, IFNULL(SUM(member_deposit_withdrawal_difference), 0) AS memberAccessDifference,
IFNULL(SUM(first_member_deposit_amount), 0) AS firstDepositAmount, IFNULL(SUM(first_member_deposit_people_number), 0) AS firstDepositPeopleNums,
IFNULL(SUM(member_betting_amount), 0) AS betAmount, IFNULL(SUM(member_betting_valid_amount), 0) AS effectiveBetAmount,
IFNULL(SUM(member_betting_number), 0) AS bettingOrderAmount, IFNULL(SUM(member_profit_loss), 0) AS memberWinOrLose,
IFNULL(SUM(member_vip_benefits_amount), 0) AS vipWelfareAmount, IFNULL(SUM(member_vip_benefits_people_number), 0) AS vipWelfarePeopleNums,
IFNULL(SUM(member_activity_discounts_amount), 0) AS promotionAmount, IFNULL(SUM(member_activity_discounts_people_number), 0) AS promotionPeopleNums, IFNULL(SUM(used_discounts), 0) AS usedPromotion,
IFNULL(SUM(member_adjustments_amount), 0) AS totalAdjust, IFNULL(SUM(member_adjustments_add_amount), 0) AS addAmount, IFNULL(SUM(member_adjustments_add_people_number), 0) AS addAmountPeopleNum, IFNULL(SUM(member_adjustments_reduce_amount), 0) AS reduceAmount, IFNULL(SUM(member_adjustments_reduce_people_number), 0) AS reduceAmountPeopleNums,
IFNULL(SUM(platform_total_adjust), 0) AS platformTotalAdjust, IFNULL(SUM(platform_add_amount), 0) AS platformAddAmount, IFNULL(SUM(platform_add_people_num), 0) AS platformAddPeopleNum, IFNULL(SUM(platform_reduce_amount), 0) AS platformReduceAmount, IFNULL(SUM(platform_reduce_people_nums), 0) AS platformReducePeopleNums,
IFNULL(SUM(tips_amount), 0) AS tipsAmount,
IFNULL(SUM(risk_amount), 0) AS riskAmount, IFNULL(SUM(risk_add_amount), 0) AS riskAddAmount, IFNULL(SUM(risk_add_people_num), 0) AS riskAddPeopleNum, IFNULL(SUM(risk_reduce_amount), 0) AS riskReduceAmount, IFNULL(SUM(risk_reduce_people_num), 0) AS riskReducePeopleNum,
IFNULL(SUM(agent_registration_count), 0) AS agentRegisterTotal, IFNULL(SUM(agent_registration_count_backed), 0) AS agentRegisterBacked, IFNULL(SUM(agent_registration_count_pc), 0) AS agentRegisterPc, IFNULL(SUM(agent_registration_count_android_app), 0) AS agentRegisterAndroidAPP, IFNULL(SUM(agent_registration_count_android_h5), 0) AS agentRegisterAndroidH5, IFNULL(SUM(agent_registration_count_ios_app), 0) AS agentRegisterIosAPP, IFNULL(SUM(agent_registration_count_ios_h5), 0) AS agentRegisterIosH5,
IFNULL(SUM(stored_members_limit), 0) AS agentCredit, IFNULL(SUM(stored_members_limit_people_number), 0) AS agentCreditPeopleNums, IFNULL(SUM(stored_members_limit_times), 0) AS agentCreditTimes
FROM report_membership_stats WHERE 1=1
AND DATE(FROM_UNIXTIME(date / 1000)) >= CURDATE() - INTERVAL 7 DAY
AND site_code = #{vo.siteCode}
AND currency = #{vo.currencyCode}
AND date >= #{vo.beginTime}
AND date <= #{vo.endTime}
group by site_code,currency
